sentences.text: 'I am very sorry,' said little Hans, rubbing his eyes and taking off his night-cap, 'but I was so tired that I stayed in bed to listen to the birds sing.
Do you know I always work better after hearing the birds sing?
'I am glad to hear that,' said the Miller, patting little Hans on the back, 'because I need you to come to the mill and fix my barn roof after you get dressed.
Poor little Hans wanted to work in his garden because his flowers needed water, but he did not want to say no to the Miller, who was a good friend.
